title: micrococca beddomei
intro: Micrococca beddomei, also known as the Beddome's bitter wood or bitter wood, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Micrococca beddomei include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimalarial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and combat infections. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into a decoction or infused in water to create a herbal remedy, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
